Tainted Breath  

Description

1: Increase Poison Counter by 5
2: Decrease HP when cast by 10
3: Decrease Hitpoints by 10 per tick. Max: 22 per tick

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 58 Skill: Conjuration
Casting Time: 2.5 Recast Time: 1.5
Fizzle Time: 1.5 Resist: Poison
Range: 200 Location: Any
Time of Day: Any Fizzle Adj: 25
Deletable: Yes Dot Stacking: Yes
Reflectable: Yes Focusable: Yes
Dispellable: No Interruptable: Yes
Short Buff Box: No Target Type: Single
Spell Type: Detrimental Source: Live 12/03

Messages

Cast on you: You have been poisoned.
Cast on other: Soandso has been poisoned.
Effect Fades: You are no longer poisoned.

Game Description

Fills your target's blood with poison, causing 10 damage initially and between 10 and @3 damage every six seconds for 42 secs (7 ticks).

Items with this effect

  • Poisoned Whip
  • SkyIron Cudgel of the Arisen
  • Spell: Tainted Breath

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Spell: Tainted Breath
ClassLevel
SHM8
BST19
Expansion:

Duration:
7 ticks
  • Comments (24)
  • Sold By (12)
  • NPCs with Ability (5)
  • Screenshots

Merchants:


Abysmal Sea
  • Adnia Pashdi - 1gp 1sp 5cp

Cabilis East
  • Grazik Plaguebringer - 1gp 3sp 9cp
  • Vessel Kirtokk - 1gp 4sp 2cp

Crescent Reach
  • Amilan - 1pp 4sp 9cp

East Freeport
  • Firrion Roweus - 1pp 4sp 9cp

Everfrost Peaks
  • Starn Bearjumper - 1gp 1sp 5cp

Innothule Swamp
  • Stragak - 1pp 1gp 4sp 3cp

Shar Vahl
  • Dar Khura Ahmih - 1gp 8sp 2cp

Shar Vahl, Divided (NoS)
  • Dar Khura Ahmih - NoS - 1gp 1sp 5cp

The Mines of Gloomingdeep
  • Celrak - 1pp 2gp 7sp 2cp

The Plane of Knowledge
  • Mystic Abomin - 1gp 1sp 5cp
  • Primalist Saosith - 1gp 1sp 5cp
  • a highland kobold shaman
  • Bargynn
  • High Shaman Drogik
  • Officer Grush
  • Vopuk Shralok

# Sep 04 2016 at 6:33 AM Rating: Decent

7 posts
it seems troll and ogre shaman don't get to buy this spell pre-luclin as the vendor mentioned in Innothulle is not there, even took my tracker in to find him with no luck.
▲ Page top
Trolls and ogres
QuoteReply
# Sep 05 2016 at 4:57 PM Rating: Excellent
Gidono
View User Forum
Moderator
6,835 posts
ryokoryu wrote:
it seems troll and ogre shaman don't get to buy this spell pre-luclin as the vendor mentioned in Innothulle is not there, even took my tracker in to find him with no luck.


This spell was introduced when PoP was released. I have marked the scroll as PoP.

This along with most of the shaman/beastlord DoT spells is now being sold in Innathule Swamp again. The vendor is located on top of one of the giant stone hands.

QuoteReply
# Oct 16 2004 at 3:37 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591777380924
Scholar
220 posts
As noted below, in Shar VAl - he will sell to Ogres. He is on second floor of building at N-212, N-362. The door on first floor is at N-324, N-371 around the corner from the bank.He has many shaman spells of varios levels that have to do with disease - both defensive and offensiv. Happy hunting.

# Apr 18 2004 at 5:04 PM Rating: Good

150 posts
Thre used to be a guy in the swamp out side old grobb, i had bought stuff from him with my iksar shammy. Not sure if he is still there since the froggys took over, my guess is not. Another option may be Shar Val. They will sell to ya, not postitive if this is sold there but worth a shot.

Starn Bearjumer is located on top of a stone platform next to a fallen pillar in Everfrost +2875, -3440, -35.

# Dec 27 2003 at 8:14 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759086433
1 post
Starn Bearjumper in everfrost sells poisen base spells. Take a left out of halas follow the wall a bit and he is on a large looks like platform like thing. not sure of LOC. If you cross the river you went too far.

# Nov 26 2003 at 1:47 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592256320307
4 posts
This spell is not sold in Halas it is sold in Everfrost by the same vendor who sells all the other poison based shammie spells. He is out on the tundra at a ruins near Megan's tower
